steps.title: Convert the percent
steps.content:
The expression $286\%$ of $x$ means
$$
\frac{286}{100}x=2.86x
$$
So the rule can be written as $f(x)=2.86x$.

steps.title: Classify the function
steps.content: The expression $2.86x$ is linear because the variable is multiplied by a constant and is not in an exponent. Since the coefficient $2.86$ is positive, the output increases as $x$ increases. The answer is D.
